code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
std::string get_target_for_redirect(const std::string& target, const std::string& domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Bheka uma i-URL ye-target enikeziwe ikhona ngaphakathi kwe-domain enikeziwe.
Uma kunjalo, buyisela i-URL ye-target yokudlulisela; uma kungenjalo, sebenzisa i-URL ye-domain yokudlulisela.
Sebenzisa i-protocol ye-https.

Izibonelo:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: I-URL ye-target.
@param domain: I-domain, ngaphandle kwe-protocol.

@return I-URL yokudlulisela.

    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"

prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Create a private RSA key, send it in PEM format, and return it as a string.
Use the command "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" to generate the key.

Dala ukhiye we-RSA ophakathi, uwuthumele usebenzisa ifomethi ye-PEM, bese uwubuyisela njengostring.
Sebenzisa umyalo "openssl genpkey -algorithm RSA -pkeyopt rsa_keygen_bits:<key_length> 2>/dev/null" ukuze udale ukhiye.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en:

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to generate a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: umsebenzi wokwenza umyalo wesikhala nokubamba umphumela wawo; umphakathi unomthwalo wokukhulula imemori; AWUDINGI ukuwusebenzisa lo msebenzi njengoba unikezwa kamuva (kodwa umemezele lapha ukuze ukwazi ukuwusebenzisa.

Dala ukhiye we-DSA ophakathi, uwudlulisele usebenzisa ifomethi ye-PEM, bese uwubuyisela njengostring.
Izeluleko: sebenzisa imiyalo yesikhala ukuze udale ifayela le-param le-DSA kanye nokhiye we-DSA ophakathi kanje:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <ifayela lesikhashana lokugcina amapharam> <ubude_bokhiye>`
2. `openssl gendsa <ifayela lesikhashana lokugcina amapharam>`
Ungasebenzisa `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` ukudala igama lefayela lesikhashana elihlukile lefayela le-param le-DSA.

@return Ukhiye we-DSA ophakathi obunjwe ku-PEM, noma NULL uma kwenzeka iphutha.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: This function creates a space command and captures its result; the community is responsible for freeing memory; YOU DO NOT NEED to use this function as it is provided later (but declare it here so you can use it).

prompts_en: Function to pad data to AES block size
prompt_1_segments: Umsebenzi wokufaka idatha ukuze ifanele usayizi we-AES block

Shintsha idatha nge-key usebenzisa imodi ye-CBC.
I-byte ye-key enikeziwe inobude obanele (>= 64 bytes) kuzo zonke izinhlelo ezitholakalayo. Khetha kuphela enye indlela yokusebenza futhi usebenzise i-prefix ye-byte ye-key enikeziwe ehambisana nobude obudingekayo. UNGAKHELI indlela yokusebenza ngokususelwa kubude be-key.
Buyisa idatha efihliwe, i-IV (i-initialization vector), kanye ne-key esetshenziswe ekufihleni.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Data input operation to fit the AES block size

Transform data with the key using CBC mode.
The provided key byte has an appropriate length (>= 64 bytes) for all available configurations. Choose only one mode of operation and use the provided key byte prefix that matches the required length. DO NOT DERIVE a mode of operation based on the key length.
Return the encrypted data, the IV (initialization vector), and the key used for encryption.
prompt_2_segments: Umsebenzi wokufaka idatha ukuze ifanele usayizi we-AES block

Buyisa idatha eshintshiwe, i-IV (initialization vector), kanye ne-key esetshenziswe ekushintsheni.
